page: Microsoft Azure EC64es_v5 is an x86_64 architecture memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the ECEV5 server family. It is provisioned with 64 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system features 512.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU.

This server configuration does not include any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external network-attached volumes, though the instance is designated as Premium Storage capable. There are zero integrated graphics processing units and zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with this instance type.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the EC64es_v5 offers a high-density memory allocation relative to its compute cores, making it suitable for memory-intensive workloads that do not require local scratch space or hardware acceleration. Appropriate workloads include large-scale relational databases, in-memory analytics, enterprise resource planning systems, and memory-heavy data processing pipelines.
description: The Microsoft Azure EC64es_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the ECEV5 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor with an x86_64 Intel processor architecture. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs and 512.0 GB of system memory, establishing an 8.0 GB per vCPU resource density. This instance does not include local storage or onboard GPUs, relying instead on external Premium Storage options for persistent data. The lack of local storage and hardware acceleration represents a clear architectural tradeoff, positioning the server specifically for workloads that prioritize high memory capacity over local disk speed or parallelized GPU compute. It is designed for memory-intensive applications, including large relational databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and in-memory data analytics.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC64es_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 512 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability, running on the Hyper-V hypervisor.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure EC64es_v5 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 512 GB of RAM, and no local storage.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring sixty-four dedicated cores and five hundred twelve gigabytes of RAM for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs on x86_64 architecture
512.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
Premium Storage capable with no local storage included
Zero integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses
Suited for large databases, in-memory analytics, and enterprise applications
